name: Longevity & Biohacking Research
tagline: Multi-year research journal — PEMF, nootropics, fasting protocols, mitochondrial optimization, Flexner Report analysis
description: Ongoing research across AI chat sessions covering: PEMF therapy mechanisms and clinical evidence, nootropic stacks, intermittent fasting and autophagy, mitochondrial biogenesis, cold exposure, sleep optimization, and the historical suppression of non-pharmaceutical interventions. Cross-referenced across ChatGPT, Grok, and Claude sessions.
